calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-15-2019 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned by Dept. 501 for Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703. Email: mlyon@sftc.org.

Kaquiska Turner, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc.
Manuel Fuentes, Supportive Housing Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant D'Marco Degraffenreid.
The Court makes a finding that defendant D'Marco Degraffenried has voluntarily absented himself from today's proceedings and does not wish to contest the allegations in the complaint.

Plaintiff's complaint was filed on February 19, 2019.
Defendant's answer was filed on March 4, 2019.
Notice of Time & Place of Trial was served on April 2, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc., and against defendant D'Marco Degraffenried, as follows:

Judgment is for Possession Only of the premises located at 34 Sixth Street, Room #120, San Francisco, CA 94103.

The rental agreement is canceled and the lease is forfeited.

Proposed Judgment for Possession Only was submitted to and signed by the Court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Apr-15-2019 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-11-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge: Charles Haines; Clerk: R. Sahatjian; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Authority is present is represented by Manuel Fuentes.
Attorney Kaguishka Turner for the plaintiff.
Defendant D'Marco Degraffenreid is NOT present.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar; no appearance by defendant. The trial date of Apr-15-2019 remains on calendar. (501)
